AboutPage.title: About me
AboutPage.intro: A Junior Full Stack Developer focused on continuous growth, practical projects, and building well-structured web solutions.
AboutPage.paragraph1: I graduated in Systems Analysis and Development and have been building my path with a focus on full stack development, working on projects involving interface, backend, databases, and integration between application layers.
AboutPage.paragraph2: My current main stack includes JavaScript, Node.js, React, Next.js, PostgreSQL, HTML, and CSS. I am looking for a remote opportunity to keep growing technically, contribute to real projects, and grow within a team.
AboutPage.paragraph3: I am honest about my current level, I learn fast, I like getting hands-on, and I am committed to continuous improvement.
AboutPage.card1Description: I prefer learning by building. Each project strengthens my web development practice and my confidence to solve real problems.
AboutPage.card2Description: I study consistently and aim to improve every day, always willing to learn new practices and improve my code.
AboutPage.card3Description: I value collaboration, clear communication, and organization. I like building with feedback and shared growth.
